seoTitle: Beacon Hill vs Beaconsfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beacon Hill and Beaconsfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Beacon Hill vs Beaconsfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beacon Hill and Beaconsfield.
heading: Beacon Hill vs Beaconsfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beacon Hill, New South Wales and Beaconsfield, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaconsfield has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Beacon Hill (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beacon Hill or Beaconsfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beacon Hill has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Beaconsfield scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beacon Hill scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Beaconsfield scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beacon Hill or Beaconsfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaconsfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
